advancements.spacereloaded.assembly_tabl: Craft the assembly table — the heart of your industry
advancements.spacereloaded.cannon.descri: Orbital cannon: a tungsten rod settles arguments with ½mv²
advancements.spacereloaded.cannon.title: Kinetic Diplomacy
advancements.spacereloaded.capsule.descr: Return capsule: titanium, heat shield, survives touchdown up to 25 m/s
advancements.spacereloaded.capsule.title: Ticket Home
advancements.spacereloaded.docking.descr: Docking clamp: the carrier waits in orbit while the lander works below
advancements.spacereloaded.docking.title: Rendezvous
advancements.spacereloaded.home.descript: Close the loop: space → atmosphere → home
advancements.spacereloaded.home.title: Welcome Back
advancements.spacereloaded.isru.descript: Electrolyzer: lunar ice → hydrolox. We fly home on local fuel
advancements.spacereloaded.isru.title: Fuel from Ice
advancements.spacereloaded.kerolox.descr: Refinery: oil shale → kerolox (sulfur on the side)
advancements.spacereloaded.kerolox.title: Black Gold
advancements.spacereloaded.launch_site.d: Pad and pylon bound your build envelope
advancements.spacereloaded.moon.descript: The Moon. Regolith crunches under your landing legs
advancements.spacereloaded.moon.title: Sea of Tranquility
advancements.spacereloaded.orbit.descrip: Earth orbit: a platform, a station, weightlessness
advancements.spacereloaded.orbit.title: Orbital Velocity
advancements.spacereloaded.power.descrip: A battery: coal by day, solar always, RTG forever
advancements.spacereloaded.power.title: Power Grid
advancements.spacereloaded.rocketry.desc: A kerolox engine: tungsten nozzle, honest physics
advancements.spacereloaded.root.title: SpaceReloaded
advancements.spacereloaded.sealed.descri: Atmosphere controller: a sealed volume — and a diagonal gap is still a gap
advancements.spacereloaded.sealed.title: Holding Pressure
advancements.spacereloaded.steel.descrip: Crusher → dust, blend → electric furnace: your first steel ingot
advancements.spacereloaded.steel.title: Age of Steel
advancements.spacereloaded.suit.descript: Mask and canister — vacuum only forgives the prepared
advancements.spacereloaded.suit.title: Suit Up
hud.spacereloaded.rocket.hint_parked: Jump — launch · Sprint — destination · Sneak+RMB — disassemble
message.spacereloaded.airlock_interlock: Airlock interlock: another hatch is open
message.spacereloaded.assembly.disconnec: Part at %s is not connected to the command module
message.spacereloaded.assembly.mixed_fue: Mixed fuel types at %s — one rocket, one fuel
message.spacereloaded.assembly.no_comman: The rocket needs a command module
message.spacereloaded.assembly.no_pad: The pylon must stand on or next to launch pad plates
message.spacereloaded.assembly.no_parts: No rocket parts above the pad
message.spacereloaded.assembly.not_comma: Assembly must start from a Command Module
message.spacereloaded.assembly.use_pylon: Build on a launch pad and right-click the assembly pylon
message.spacereloaded.cannon.fired: Shot fired! Target %s, %s, %s — impact in ~%s s
message.spacereloaded.cannon.no_mark: Mark a target on the surface with the designator first
message.spacereloaded.cannon.no_target: No target assigned — use a targeting designator
message.spacereloaded.cannon.not_in_orbi: The cannon only operates in orbit
message.spacereloaded.designator.marked: Mark: %s @ %s — now aim the cannon (right-click it)
message.spacereloaded.designator.no_boun: Remote not bound — Sneak+RMB a cannon
message.spacereloaded.dock.docked: Docked: captured %s blocks, propellant merged (%s kg)
message.spacereloaded.dock.lander_invali: No engine and control seat below the clamp — lander cannot fly
message.spacereloaded.dock.no_lander: No parked craft below the clamp (3-block capture)
message.spacereloaded.dock.nothing_below: Nothing below the clamp to undock
message.spacereloaded.hose.no_tank: No linked tank in reach (16 blocks)
message.spacereloaded.mission_control.em: Mission Control: no craft within 64 m
message.spacereloaded.program.empty: Program is blank: Sneak+RMB — destination, RMB a beacon — landing point
message.spacereloaded.program.unreachabl: Destination %s is unreachable from this dimension
message.spacereloaded.rocket.autopilot_o: Autopilot only flies to orbit (board and press Sprint to change destination)
message.spacereloaded.rocket.mount_hint: Right-click the rocket to board; Jump = ignition, Sneak = engine cutoff
message.spacereloaded.rocket.reached_orb: Orbit reached! You are on your orbital pad — build your station. Ignite again and climb to deorbit.
message.spacereloaded.rocket.reentry: Atmospheric reentry! Hold Jump for the retro burn — touch down below 15 m/s.
message.spacereloaded.rocket.stats: Mass %s kg (dry %s) · Thrust %s kN · TWR %s · Δv %s m/s

message.spacereloaded.rocket.warning.TWR: ⚠ TWR below 1 — it will not lift off
